sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Prologis Prices C$850 Million Senior Notes Offering
feed.summary: Prologis, L.P. has priced an offering of C$850 million in 4.250% senior unsecured notes due 2034, expecting to raise approximately C$839.9 million in net proceeds. These funds will be used for general corporate purposes, including repaying credit facilities and other debt. Prologis stock (PLD) currently holds a "Buy" rating from analysts with a $154.00 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst "Spark" also rates it as "Outperform" due to strong fundamentals and technical momentum.

feed.title: Prologis Prices C$850 Million Senior Unsecured Notes
feed.summary: Prologis, L.P. has successfully priced an offering of C$850 million in 4.250% senior unsecured notes due 2034, with the closing expected on April 27, 2026. The net proceeds of approximately C$839.9 million will be used for general corporate purposes, including debt repayment, to enhance funding flexibility and extend its debt maturity profile. This move aims to strengthen Prologis's financial position and support its investment strategies within the logistics sector.

feed.title: Johnson Controls acquires Nantum AI to accelerate AI-driven energy optimization and control capabilities within OpenBlue
feed.summary: Johnson Controls has acquired Nantum AI, a New York-based company specializing in AI algorithms for energy optimization. This acquisition strengthens Johnson Controls' OpenBlue digital ecosystem by integrating Nantum AI's proven algorithms, which enhance HVAC performance and reduce energy consumption through advanced AI-driven control capabilities. The combined offering aims to provide more comprehensive optimization for complex facilities and has already delivered over 10% energy savings in pilot programs.

feed.title: Adobe downgraded at Mizuho amid 'weakened' conviction (ADBE:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Mizuho Securities downgraded Adobe (ADBE) due to weakened conviction, citing intensifying competition in the prosumer/SMB segments. This competition is seen as a threat to Adobe's long-term terminal value. Following the downgrade, Adobe shares fell 1.5% in premarket trading.

feed.title: Greenland Energy (NASDAQ: GLND) Signs Halliburton Agreement for 2026 Jameson Land Drilling Campaign
feed.summary: Greenland Energy (NASDAQ: GLND) has signed an agreement with Halliburton for integrated consulting and logistical services for its 2026 drilling campaign in the Jameson Land Basin of Greenland. This partnership, following other strategic agreements, secures advanced well technologies and expertise for operations in the Arctic. The collaboration is a key step in Greenland Energy's strategy to responsibly develop the region's hydrocarbon resources and drill its first two wells in 2026.

feed.title: Top 3 catalysts for Nasdaq 100 Index and QQQ ETF this week
feed.summary: The Nasdaq 100 Index and QQQ ETF are at record highs, driven by a risk-on sentiment and an ongoing ceasefire between the US and Iran. Key catalysts this week include big-tech earnings reports, which will provide insights into AI spending ROI, and the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision, with market reaction depending on the tone of Jerome Powell's "farewell" comments. Additionally, updates on the US-Iran situation could significantly impact crude oil prices and the stock market.

feed.title: Halliburton joins Greenland’s bid to drill 2 Arctic wells in 2026
feed.summary: Greenland Energy (NASDAQ: GLND) has signed an agreement with Halliburton for integrated consulting, logistics, and well and drilling services for its 2026 onshore campaign in the Jameson Land Basin. This partnership, which follows agreements with Stampede Drilling and Desgagnés, aims to support the planned drilling of the first two wells in 2026 within this 2 million-acre, undrilled frontier basin. The news prompted a positive market reaction, with GLND stock gaining 9.34%.

feed.title: OptimumBank tells shareholders how it hit 21.56% returns in 2025
feed.summary: OptimumBank Holdings (OPHC) will hold its Annual Shareholder Meeting and Investor Day on April 28, 2026, to highlight its most successful year, with a Core Return on Average Equity (ROAE) of 21.56% and a Net Interest Margin (NIM) of 4.28% for fiscal 2025. The company will also present updated Q1 2026 performance data. Investors can attend virtually, and the presentation deck is available online.

feed.title: OptimumBank Holdings, Inc. Reports Best Year in Company History; To Present Shareholder Deck Highlighting 21%+ Core ROAE at April 28, 2026 Annual Meeting
feed.summary: OptimumBank Holdings, Inc. announced its Annual Shareholder Meeting and Investor Day for April 28, 2026, where it will present the company's most successful year to date. Key highlights for fiscal year 2025 include a Core Return on Average Equity (ROAE) of 21.56% and a Net Interest Margin (NIM) of 4.28%, with updated performance data for Q1 2026 also to be shared. The public is invited to attend virtually to learn more about the ongoing operational momentum and strategic growth.

feed.title: Invesco Ltd: Form 8.3 - Aptitude Software Group PLC; Public dealing disclosure
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. has filed a Form 8.3 public dealing disclosure regarding Aptitude Software Group PLC. The disclosure details Invesco's interests and short positions in Aptitude Software Group PLC's ordinary shares, showing ownership of 1,079,323 shares representing 1.97% of the company. It also reports a recent sale of 2,500 ordinary shares at a price of 2.33 GBP per unit.

feed.title: Raymond James Adjusts Vistra PT to $208 From $240, Maintains Strong Buy Rating
feed.summary: Raymond James has revised its price target for Vistra Corp. (VST) reducing it from $240 to $208, while reiterating a "Strong Buy" rating for the stock. The article also lists recent analyst price target adjustments for Vistra from other firms like Jefferies, Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan, and BNP Paribas, indicating ongoing analyst attention to the company. Vistra Corp. is described as an integrated retail and electric power generation company, operating in various segments with approximately 41,000 megawatts of installed generation capacity.

feed.title: Argus Research Adjusts Tractor Supply Price Target to $50 From $64, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Argus Research has lowered its price target for Tractor Supply (TSCO) shares to $50 from $64, while still maintaining a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst several other analyst firms also updating their price targets for the company in late April. Despite the revised target, Argus Research continues to recommend the stock as a Buy.

feed.title: Domino's Hit By Budget-Conscious Diners, Shares Tumble
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza (NASDAQ: DPZ) saw its shares tumble after reporting first-quarter earnings and revenue that missed analyst expectations, primarily due to budget-conscious consumers cutting back on dining out. Despite increased operating income and strong cash flow, the company's U.S. and international same-store sales growth was modest or negative, reflecting challenges from persistent inflation and rising costs. Domino's announced a new $1.0 billion share repurchase program alongside its dividend declaration, aiming to return value to shareholders.

feed.title: Citi expanding investment banking in Japan and China - report (C:NYSE)
feed.summary: Citigroup is reportedly expanding its investment banking teams in Japan and China by adding senior bankers. This initiative aims to increase cross-border M&A deals and comes as the bank finalizes a multi-year global restructuring.

feed.title: Microchip Expands PIC MCUs with Integrated Programmable Logic
feed.summary: Microchip Technology has expanded its PIC microcontroller portfolio with the introduction of the PIC16F13276 and PIC18-Q35 families, which integrate configurable logic block (CLB) functionality. These new MCUs are designed to improve real-time performance and reduce latency in timing-critical applications by implementing logic functions directly in hardware. The devices also aim to simplify system design by combining programmable logic and MCU capabilities into a single chip, supported by enhanced development tools for easier configuration and validation.

feed.title: Oculis reports final phase 3 patient visit for DME eye drops
feed.summary: Oculis Holding AG announced the completion of the final patient visit in its OCS-01 phase 3 DIAMOND program for diabetic macular edema (DME). OCS-01 is a high-concentration dexamethasone formulation utilizing OPTIREACH technology for non-invasive topical treatment, designed to improve drug solubility and residence time on the eye. Positive topline data from stage 1 of the DIAMOND-1 trial have already shown significant improvement in visual acuity, with an NDA submission targeted for Q4 2026.

feed.title: HCA Announces Proposed Public Offering of Senior Notes
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare, Inc. announced a proposed public offering of senior notes through its subsidiary, HCA Inc., subject to market conditions. The net proceeds are intended for general corporate purposes, including the repayment of borrowings under its commercial paper program and potential redemption of existing senior notes due in June and September 2026. Citigroup Global Markets Inc., Barclays Capital Inc., BofA Securities, Inc., and J.P. Morgan Securities LLC are acting as joint book-running managers for the offering.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Decreases Stock Holdings in Fortinet, Inc. $FTNT
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Fortinet, Inc. by 2.4% in the fourth quarter, selling over 1.8 million shares but still holding 9.92% of the company, valued at approximately $5.86 billion. Fortinet reported strong Q4 EPS of $0.81, beating estimates, and provided positive Q1 and FY2026 guidance. Despite this, the stock carries an average analyst rating of "Hold" with an average price target of $87.72, and company insiders recently sold a significant number of shares.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Acquires 2,349,176 Shares of Ventas, Inc. $VTR
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. increased its stake in Ventas, Inc. (NYSE:VTR) by 3.2% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 2,349,176 shares to bring its total holding to 75,948,003 shares, valued at approximately $5.88 billion. The company holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $90.47, despite missing quarterly EPS estimates but showing year-over-year revenue growth and increasing its quarterly dividend. Insider activity shows recent sales by the CEO and an EVP.

feed.title: Domino’s reports disappointing sales growth in ‘intensifying’ competitive market
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza, the world's largest pizza company, is facing disappointing sales growth amidst an increasingly competitive market. The article highlights this challenge for the Ann Arbor-based company, which has a significant presence in both delivery and carryout services.

feed.title: HSBC Adjusts Price Target on Equinix to $1,250 From $1,100, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: HSBC has increased its price target for Equinix (EQIX) shares to $1,250 from $1,100, while maintaining a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook on the data center operator.

feed.title: ON Semiconductor Corp. Hits New 52-Week High at $100.26
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor Corp. has achieved a new 52-week high of $100.26, demonstrating strong performance in the Other Electrical Equipment industry with a one-year growth of 33.88%, surpassing the S&P 500. The company showcases a robust financial position with a market capitalization of USD 33,709 million, a P/E ratio of 44.00, a low debt-to-equity ratio of 0.06, and a return on equity of 10.06%. This milestone reflects the company's effective management and strategic market positioning.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher to sell its microbiology business to Astorg for about $1.08 billion
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific is selling its microbiology business to private equity firm Astorg for approximately $1.08 billion, which includes cash and a $50 million seller note. The microbiology unit, which generated $645 million in revenue in 2025, provides products for clinical, pharmaceutical, and food safety applications. Thermo Fisher anticipates the deal, expected to close in the second half of 2026, will be dilutive to its adjusted earnings per share by $0.15 in the first full year post-closure.

feed.title: NXP Announces Availability of Proxy Materials for the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders to Be Held on June 10, 2026
feed.summary: NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ: NXPI) announced the availability of proxy materials for its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders, scheduled for June 10, 2026, at its headquarters in Eindhoven, The Netherlands. The company has filed its definitive proxy statement and annual report with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission and expects to distribute the notice of internet availability of proxy materials by May 20, 2026. Shareholders can access these materials at nxp.com/agm or request paper copies.

feed.title: Target gives 150 remote workers ultimatum: Relocate to Minneapolis or take severance
feed.summary: Target has issued an ultimatum to approximately 150 remote workers within its merchandising unit, requiring them to relocate to Minneapolis or accept a severance package. This decision follows recent leadership changes and a period of sluggish growth for the retailer. The move aims to bring these teams back to the company's downtown Minneapolis headquarters.

feed.title: Exclusive-Companies dust off oil rigs in storage in Venezuela as contracts are overhauled
authors: Marianna Parraga and Ana Isabel Martinez
feed.summary: Oilfield service companies in Venezuela are pulling rigs and specialized equipment out of storage for repair and assembly, anticipating increased activity following a government review of oil and gas contracts. This renewed confidence stems from new agreements for area expansions, block awards, and asset swaps, with at least nine rigs already being prepared for deployment. The government is also seeking other essential equipment to boost oil production, potentially reaching 1.37 million bpd by year-end.

feed.title: Philip Morris (NYSE: PM) prices dual senior note series with make-whole and tax‑call terms
feed.summary: Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE: PM) has priced two series of senior unsecured notes, incorporating make-whole and tax-call provisions. The notes will be issued in book-entry form and rank equally with other senior unsecured debt, with proceeds intended for general corporate purposes, debt repayment, or refinancing outstanding commercial paper and 0.875% Notes due 2026. The offering prospectus details interest payments, optional redemption mechanisms, and specified U.S. tax considerations for investors.

feed.title: American International Group Announces CEO Transition to Andersen
feed.summary: American International Group (AIG) announced a leadership transition, with Eric Andersen taking over as President, CEO, and Director starting June 1, 2026. Current CEO Peter Zaffino will transition to executive chair, aiming for continuity in the company's growth and transformation. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates AIG as Neutral due to solid financial quality tempered by choppy income statement trends and mixed technical signals.

feed.title: Nio Onvo L80 mirrors L90 strategy with in-house developed chip integration
feed.summary: Nio's sub-brand Onvo is launching its L80 five-seat SUV with a strategy mirroring that of the L90, offering both LiDAR and pure vision options. High-end trims of the L80 will feature Nio's in-house developed Shenji NX9031 chip and the Nio World Model (NWM) assisted driving system, while the pure vision version will use Nvidia's Orin X. This move aligns with Nio's efforts to integrate advanced smart driving technology across its new vehicle launches to maintain delivery growth.

feed.title: Travelers expands California homeowners insurance availability under reform
feed.summary: The Travelers Companies has announced an expansion of its homeowners insurance product availability across California. This move is part of the company's voluntary participation in California's Sustainable Insurance Strategy. The decision was made public on Friday.

feed.title: AbbVie asks FDA to let Crohn's patients start SKYRIZI by shot
feed.summary: AbbVie has submitted an application to the FDA for approval of SKYRIZI (risankizumab-rzaa) as a subcutaneous induction treatment for adults with moderately to severely active Crohn's disease. This application is supported by positive Phase 3 AFFIRM study data and, if approved, would offer patients the choice of either subcutaneous or intravenous induction, followed by subcutaneous maintenance every eight weeks. The company anticipates FDA approval later in 2026, aiming to enhance treatment flexibility and convenience for Crohn's patients.

feed.title: Today's Analyst Rating | BNP Paribas Downgrades GE Vernova to Hold, RTX Corp Price Target Raised to $195 by Goldman Sachs
feed.summary: BNP Paribas has downgraded GE Vernova (NYSE: GEV) to "Hold" from "Outperform," while Goldman Sachs has increased its price target for RTX Corp (NYSE: RTX) to $195.00 from $117.00, maintaining a "Buy" rating. These actions reflect differing outlooks for the respective companies.

feed.title: NTLA Jumps Premarket On Positive Late-Stage Trial Data For Gene-Editing Therapy — Retail Says Buy Now Before It’s Too Late
feed.summary: Intellia Therapeutics (NTLA) shares surged pre-market following positive late-stage trial data for its gene-editing therapy, lonvoguran ziclumeran (lonvo-z), for hereditary angioedema (HAE). The therapy met primary and secondary endpoints, with 62% of patients free of HAE attacks, compared to 11% on placebo. Intellia has initiated a rolling Biologics License Application submission to the FDA and aims for a U.S. launch in the first half of 2027.

feed.title: Mark Cuban's drug company links with Humana on lower-cost prescriptions
feed.summary: CenterWell Pharmacy®, part of Humana Inc. (NYSE: HUM), has partnered with Mark Cuban Cost Plus Drug Company (Cost Plus Drugs) to develop new employer prescription solutions aimed at lowering costs and improving access to medications. The collaboration will leverage Cost Plus Drugs' digital pharmacy SaaS solution, SwiftyRx™, for medication order intake and combine it with CenterWell Pharmacy's distribution capabilities to streamline patient onboarding and reduce costs. This initiative is designed to support more consumers and improve prescription affordability through a simplified approach.

feed.title: Weekly Recap: Ulta Beauty World, IPSY Report, ELC & More
feed.summary: This article provides a weekly recap of the top 10 most-viewed beauty industry news items for the week ending April 25, 2026. Key highlights include Ulta Beauty's second annual "Ulta Beauty World" event, IPSY's Beauty Discovery Report, and The Fragrance Foundation Awards finalists. Other notable news involves Estée Lauder Companies' alleged financing for a merger with Puig, Dr. Squatch's new campaign with Megan Fox, and E.l.f. Beauty's promotion of Kory Marchisotto to President of Brands.

feed.title: Domino's Posts Downbeat Q1 Results, Joins Real Brokerage And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Monday's Pr
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza reported worse-than-expected Q1 earnings of $4.13 per share and sales of $1.151 billion, causing its shares to dip 3.8% in pre-market trading. Several other companies, including Compass Therapeutics and Real Brokerage Inc., also saw significant movement in pre-market trading, with some falling due to disappointing results or acquisition news, while Compass Therapeutics rose on clinical study news.

feed.title: Keefe Bruyette & Woods Adjusts Globe Life PT to $180 From $168, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Keefe Bruyette & Woods has increased its price target for Globe Life (GL) to $180 from $168, while reiterating an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst actions on Globe Life, including Jefferies & Co adjusting its price target to $147 and maintaining a Hold rating, and Truist Securities increasing its price target to $185 with a Buy rating. The company recently reported its Q1 2026 earnings, which saw a rise in profit and an updated full-year EPS guidance.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts Price Target on Verisk Analytics to $190 From $230, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has adjusted its price target for Verisk Analytics (VRSK) from $230 to $190 while maintaining a "Hold" rating on the stock. This update reflects a revised outlook for the company, though the specific reasons for the target reduction are not detailed in this report.

feed.title: NextPlat keeps Nasdaq listing after shares hold above $1 for 10 days
feed.summary: NextPlat (NASDAQ: NXPL) has announced it has regained compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price rule by maintaining a closing bid of at least $1.00 per share for 10 consecutive business days, from April 13 to April 24, 2026. This confirmation from Nasdaq on April 27, 2026, means the matter is closed and NextPlat will remain listed on The Nasdaq Capital Market. The company's recent actions included a 1-for-10 reverse stock split to help achieve this compliance, alongside strategies for growth.

feed.title: NextPlat Regains Compliance with Nasdaq Bid Price Requirement
feed.summary: NextPlat Corp announced it has regained compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement of $1.00 per share. The company received a letter from Nasdaq confirming that its shares maintained a closing bid price of $1.00 or greater for 10 consecutive business days from April 13 to April 24, 2026. This confirmation ensures NextPlat's continued listing on The Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker symbol "NXPL".

feed.title: Mizuho Adjusts Price Target on First Solar to $243 From $271, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Mizuho has adjusted its price target for First Solar (FSLR) to $243 down from $271 while maintaining an "Outperform" rating. This financial adjustment reflects a revised analyst perspective on the solar energy equipment manufacturer. The article also notes other recent analyst adjustments for First Solar from firms like Citigroup, BMO Capital, and Barclays.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher sells testing-focused microbiology business in $1.075B deal
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has signed a definitive agreement to sell its microbiology business to Astorg for approximately $1.075 billion. The unit, which provides antimicrobial susceptibility testing and culture media solutions, generated $645 million in revenue in 2025. The transaction is expected to close in the second half of 2026 and will be dilutive to adjusted earnings per share by $0.15 in the first full year post-close.

feed.title: TransDigm will post quarterly results before markets open May 5
feed.summary: TransDigm (NYSE: TDG) announced it will report its fiscal 2026 second-quarter earnings before the market opens on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. A conference call will follow at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and investors must register in advance for dial-in information or access the live audio webcast on the company's website. The webcast will also be archived for replay later that day.

feed.title: TransDigm Second Quarter Earnings Report and Conference Call Set for Tuesday, May 5, 2026
feed.summary: TransDigm Group Incorporated announced its fiscal 2026 second-quarter earnings report will be released before market open on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. A conference call is scheduled for 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day, with details provided for telephonic registration and a live audio webcast. The company is a leading global designer and supplier of highly engineered aircraft components for commercial and military use.

feed.title: One Stop Systems will post Q1 results before market open on May 6
feed.summary: One Stop Systems (Nasdaq: OSS) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results before market open on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. A webcast and conference call will follow at 10:00 a.m. ET to review results, with a replay available from May 6–20, 2026. The announcement includes dial-in numbers, conference ID, and webcast details for investors and analysts.

feed.title: The MolinaCares Accord Provides $100,000 Grant to Lurie Children’s in Support of Statewide School Mental Health Initiative
feed.summary: The MolinaCares Accord has granted $100,000 to Lurie Children’s Hospital of Chicago's Center for Childhood Resilience to support the Resilience-Supportive Schools Illinois (RSSI) initiative. This funding will help expand RSSI's efforts in equipping schools with data-driven tools and resources to improve student and educator mental health and well-being across Illinois. The initiative provides free support to schools, enabling them to create trauma-responsive and healing-centered learning environments.

feed.title: Terra Innovatum Positioned for Accelerated, Scalable Accessibility: Terra Innovatum Positioned for Accelerated, Scalable Deployment as NRC Advances Draft Part 57 Microreactor Rulemaking
feed.summary: Terra Innovatum, developer of the SOLO™ Micro-Modular Reactor, highlights the significance of the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission's (NRC) draft Part 57 microreactor rulemaking. This framework aims to support fleet-scale deployment of standardized microreactor systems, aligning with SOLO™'s design philosophy of inherent safety, modularity, and factory-based manufacturing. The company believes this regulatory evolution will accelerate commercialization and efficient deployment of its microreactor technology.

feed.title: Microchip Increases Manufacturing Capacity of its Hydrogen Masers
feed.summary: Microchip Technology has opened a new facility in Tuscaloosa, Alabama, to significantly increase its manufacturing capacity for the MHM-2020 Active Hydrogen Maser. This expansion aims to meet rising global demand for precise timekeeping devices, which are crucial for national infrastructure and critical applications like power grids and satellite communications. The company also announced a strategic collaboration with the University of Alabama, involving equipment and R&D, to further advance timing and frequency solutions.

feed.title: At a Marine expo, Oshkosh spotlights a remotely operated fires vehicle
feed.summary: Oshkosh Defense will showcase its advanced mobility and sustainment solutions at the Modern Day Marine expo from April 28–30, 2026. The company will highlight its Medium Tactical Vehicle Replacement (MTVR) Remotely Operated Ground Unit for Expeditionary Fires (ROGUE-Fires), which is equipped with the Navy/Marine Expeditionary Ship Interdiction System (NMESIS) for expeditionary, land-based fires capability. Additionally, an MTVR 4x4 with exportable power and enhanced lighting will be on display, emphasizing Oshkosh's commitment to robust, versatile platforms and lifecycle support for Marines.

feed.title: Microchip opens Alabama plant to speed atomic clocks used in global timekeeping
feed.summary: Microchip Technology (Nasdaq: MCHP) has opened a new 15,000 sqft manufacturing facility in Tuscaloosa, Alabama, dedicated to expanding production of its MHM-2020 Active Hydrogen Maser. This expansion aims to reduce lead times for critical timing products vital for global timekeeping, including satellite communications and power grids, and features a collaboration with the University of Alabama for R&D and training. The MHM-2020 offers 1 picosecond synchronization and boasts a demonstrated lifetime of over 20 years.
